description: After a major investigation is published, the reporter's notes and source documents must be securely archived for legal and historical purposes.

nodes.task_description: Gather all digital and physical notes, recordings, and documents related to the investigation.
Scan any physical documents to create digital copies.

expected_outcome.value: All materials are in a digital format.

nodes.task_description: Upload all digital files to a secure, access-controlled archival system.

expected_outcome.value: The sensitive source material is securely stored.
